title: devis.im denizen record
description: A claim for a subdomain (name.devis.im) and optional email alias (name@devis.im) on devis.im. The filename is the claimed name; this file only describes the targets.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint. Set to ../schema.json so your editor validates this file as you type.

github.description: Your GitHub username. Must match the author of the pull request that adds this file.

email.description: Optional PUBLIC contact email. Do NOT put your private forwarding address here. The address mail is forwarded to is submitted privately after merge.

record.description: Where your subdomain points. Use CNAME for most hosts (GitHub Pages, Vercel, Netlify). Use A/AAAA for a raw server IP. CNAME cannot be combined with A or AAAA.

CNAME.description: A single hostname to point to, e.g. yourname.github.io

TXT.description: A TXT record value, or an array of values.

URL.description: Redirect this subdomain to another URL.

email.description: Optional. Set enabled to true if you also want name@devis.im forwarding. Your real forwarding address is collected privately after merge and must NEVER appear in this file.

proxied.description: Route the subdomain through Cloudflare's proxy. Defaults to false.
